subject: [PATCH] btrfs: fix missing last_unlink_trans update when removing a directory

reviews.author: Filipe Manana
reviews.summary: Reviewer questioned the accuracy of a comment in btrfs_record_unlink_dir() documentation, noting that it may be outdated due to changes since its addition in 2016.
reviews.raw_body:
I think that may be outdated, I added that comment back in 2016 but a
lot has changed since then.

I'll move the call up in v2 for now and then see if I can cleanup and
simplify some things around that logic.

Thanks.

2026-04-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug where the last_unlink_trans update was not being updated when removing a directory in Btrfs. The issue arose from an intentional change to only call btrfs_record_unlink_dir() on success, which could lead to unexpected behavior if btrfs_unlink() does not react correctly to non-zero return values. The patch updates the code to ensure that btrfs_record_unlink_dir() is always called before unlink operations.
